item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p02","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response clearly wakes the anti-spiral brake in the first sentence, names the repeated local-reminder pattern, and moves upstream toward a unified checklist or validation flow. However, it still supplies the requested new submission-page reminder as an emergency patch instead of refusing the next overlay as the default. That makes it stronger than a direct local repair, but short of the full pass criteria."}
